headline: Stock market today: S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq waver as inflation fears grip markets
summary: Oil prices rose with US-Iran tensions in focus to start a week dominated by Nvidia earnings.

headline: Reports Say NextEra in Talks to Acquire Dominion Energy
summary: NextEra Energy, one of the largest electric utilities in the U.S., is reportedly in talks to acquire Virginia-based Dominion Energy.

raw.headline: Reports Say NextEra in Talks to Acquire Dominion Energy
raw.summary: NextEra Energy, one of the largest electric utilities in the U.S., is reportedly in talks to acquire Virginia-based Dominion Energy.
